case pos
ι : Type u_1
𝕜 : Type u_2
V : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : DecidableEq ι
inst✝⁴ : Field 𝕜
inst✝³ : LinearOrder 𝕜
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing 𝕜
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝ : Module 𝕜 V
s : Finset ι
x y : ι → V
hy : ∀ i ∈ s, y i ∈ (convexHull 𝕜) (x '' (↑s \ {i}))
hs : s.Nontrivial
z : V
c : ι → 𝕜
hc₀ : ∀ i ∈ s, 0 ≤ c i
hc₁ : ∀ i ∈ s, c i ≤ 1
hz : ∀ i ∈ s, (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = z
hc : ∀ i ∈ s, c i = 1
i : ι
hi : i ∈ s
⊢ (↑(s \ {i}).card)⁻¹ • ∑ x_1 ∈ s \ {i}, x x_1 = y i

        exact (hs.sdiff_singleton_nonempty hi).card_ne_zero

      exact fun j hj ↦ hx j (mem_sdiff.1 hj).1

have hx : ∀ j ∈ s, x j = z := fun j hj ↦ by simpa [hc j hj] using hz j hj
      rw [sum_congr rfl (fun j hj ↦ hx j (mem_of_mem_sdiff hj)), sum_const,
        ← Nat.cast_smul_eq_nsmul 𝕜, smul_smul, inv_mul_cancel₀, one_smul]
      · have : x '' (s \ {i}) = {z} := by
          ext; simp only [mem_image, mem_singleton_iff]; constructor
          · rintro ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩; exact hx j (mem_of_mem_sdiff hj)
          · rintro rfl; obtain ⟨j, hj, hji⟩ := hs.exists_ne i; exact ⟨j, mem_sdiff.2 ⟨hj, hji⟩, hx j hj⟩
        rw [← mem_singleton_iff, ← convexHull_singleton, ← this]
        exact hy i hi
      · rw [Nat.cast_ne_zero, card_ne_zero]
        exact (hs.exists_ne i).imp (fun _ ↦ mem_sdiff.2)

have hx : ∀ j ∈ s, x j = z := fun j hj ↦ by rw [← hc j hj, hz j hj, lineMap_apply_one]
      obtain ⟨j, hj, hji⟩ := hs.exists_ne i
      have hne : (s \ {i}).Nonempty := ⟨j, mem_sdiff.2 ⟨hj, hji⟩⟩
      rw [sum_congr rfl fun j hj ↦ hx j (sdiff_subset _ _ hj), sum_const,
        ← Nat.cast_smul_eq_nsmul 𝕜, smul_smul,
        inv_mul_cancel₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 hne.card_ne_zero), one_smul]
      refine (Set.eq_of_mem_singleton ?_).symm
      rw [← convexHull_singleton (𝕜 := 𝕜) z]
      refine convexHull_mono ?_ (hy i hi)
      simp only [Set.image_subset_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, coe_sdiff, Set.mem_diff]
      exact fun j ⟨hj, _⟩ ↦ hx j hj
